mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_BASIC ( LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, PHONE_NO, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER_CODE, BIRTH_DATE, USER_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{email}, #{phoneNo}, #{password}, #{name}, #{genderCode}, #{birthDate}, #{userStatus}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}, EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE_NO = #{phoneNo}, PASSWORD = #{password}, NAME = #{name}, GENDER_CODE = #{genderCode}, BIRTH_DATE = #{birthDate}, USER_STATUS = #{userStatus}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{insertUserId}

INSERT INTO USER_DETAIL ( USER_ID, FRIEND_MESSAGE_AVAIL_YN, HOMPI_USE_YN, CONFIRM_YN_1, CONFIRM_YN_2, CONFIRM_YN_3, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendMessageAvailYN}, #{hompiUseYN}, #{confirmYN1}, #{confirmYN2}, #{confirmYN3}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FRIEND_MESSAGE_AVAIL_YN = #{friendMessageAvailYN}, HOMPI_USE_YN = #{hompiUseYN}, CONFIRM_YN_1 = #{confirmYN1}, CONFIRM_YN_2 = #{confirmYN2}, CONFIRM_YN_3 = #{confirmYN3}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{insertUserId}
